blocks.text: Match preview: Mysore Warriors face Shivamogga Yodhas in 29th Match (T20) on Tue, 7 Jul, 2026, 7:00 pm at M.Chinnaswamy Stadium Bengaluru. Full pitch report, weather forecast, and squad details below.
High-scoring belter with good carry; dew makes chasing easier.
Drizzle · High 29°C / Low 21°C · Rain: 2.5 mm · Wind: up to 30 km/h. Light rain possible — overcast conditions could assist swing bowling early.
International playing XI is announced at the toss. Check back on match day for confirmed line-ups.
